_meta.experiment: #79 safety under the K-lever (refusal / over-refusal vs FP/K2/K3)
_meta.refusal_detector: AdvBench keyword substring match (Zou et al. 2023, arXiv:2307.15043)
_meta.detector_limitation: keyword match is a crude proxy; use the cross-K contrast, not absolute rates. It can false-positive/negative and cannot judge answer harmfulness. LLM-judge is out of scope.
_meta.question: does alignment/refusal stratify like KNOWLEDGE (robust to K2) or like REASONING (collapses at K2, K3 recovers)?
